title: stelis dewildei
intro: Stelis dewildei, also known as the orchid Stelis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis dewildei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a treatment.
